panels.title: Station scorecard — who carries the network (7 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT split_part(observer, '-', 1) AS station, max(observer) AS observer, count(*) AS frames, count(DISTINCT norad) AS satellites_heard, max(ts) AS last_reception FROM reception WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, count(*)::float AS receptions FROM reception WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT s.name AS satellite, count(DISTINCT r.observer) AS stations, count(*) AS receptions, max(r.ts) AS last_heard FROM reception r JOIN satellite s USING (norad) WHERE r.ts > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY 2 DESC
